2603.27156.title: GSR-GNN: Training Acceleration and Memory-Saving Framework of Deep GNNs on Circuit Graph
2603.27156.paper_summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) show strong promise for circuit analysis, but scaling to modern large-scale circuit graphs is limited by GPU memory and training cost, especially for deep models. We revisit deep GNNs for circuit graphs and show that, when trainable, they significantly outperform shallow architectures, motivating an efficient, domain-specific training framework. We propose Grouped-Sparse-Reversible GNN (GSR-GNN), which enables training GNNs with up to hundreds of layers while reducing both compute and memory overhead. GSR-GNN integrates reversible residual modules with a group-wise sparse nonlinear operator that compresses node embeddings without sacrificing task-relevant information, and employs an optimized execution pipeline to eliminate fragmented activation storage and reduce data movement. On sampled circuit graphs, GSR-GNN achieves up to 87.2\% peak memory reduction and over 30$\times$ training speedup with negligible degradation in correlation-based quality metrics, making deep GNNs practical for large-scale EDA workloads.
2603.27156.paper_summary_zh: 圖神經網絡（GNNs）在電路分析中顯示出強大的潛力，但擴展到現代大規模電路圖的能力受到GPU內存和訓練成本的限制，特別是對於深度模型。<lb/>我們重新審視了電路圖的深度GNN，並顯示出當可訓練時，它們顯著超越淺層架構，這促使我們提出一個高效的特定領域訓練框架。<lb/>我們提出了分組稀疏可逆GNN（GSR-GNN），它使得訓練具有數百層的GNN成為可能，同時減少計算和內存開銷。<lb/>GSR-GNN將可逆殘差模塊與一種按組稀疏的非線性運算符集成在一起，該運算符在不犧牲任務相關信息的情況下壓縮節點嵌入，並採用優化的執行管道以消除碎片化的激活存儲並減少數據移動。<lb/>在抽樣的電路圖上，GSR-GNN實現了高達87.2\%的峰值內存減少和超過30$\times$的訓練加速，且在基於相關性的質量指標上幾乎沒有降級，使得深度GNN在大規模EDA工作負載中變得實用。
2603.27156.author: Yuebo Luo et.al.
2603.27156.authors: Yuebo Luo, Shiyang Li, Yifei Feng, Vishal Kancharla, Shaoyi Huang, Caiwen Ding
